summary: Admin Place Order/Payments feature testing completed. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: Critical bug found and fixed - apiService.getAdminUsers() was not a function, changed to apiService.getAllUsers(). UI structure verified: Dashboard button, customer selector, product grid, payment modal, place order button all present. Expo tunnel had intermittent issues during final verification.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: apiService.getAdminUsers() was not a function - changed to apiService.getAllUsers()

action_items: Verify the fix for apiService.getAllUsers() is working after expo rebuild (hot reload may not have picked up the change due to CI mode)
Consider adding getAdminUsers as an alias method in api.ts if it's used elsewhere
critical_code_review_comments: admin-place-order.tsx line 60: Was calling non-existent method apiService.getAdminUsers() - FIXED to apiService.getAllUsers()

success_rate.frontend: Partial - UI structure verified, but expo tunnel issues prevented full e2e testing after fix

seed_data_creation: None - used existing customer cae2a9d4-5e04-402f-8a8d-a0388c4d4079 (Divine Cakery)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs for admin place order feature are fully working. Frontend has a bug fix applied (getAdminUsers -> getAllUsers). The expo server was restarted but running in CI mode which disables hot reload. May need to verify the fix is applied by checking if customers and products load on the admin-place-order page.

backend_tests_executed.TestPaymentSettlesOrders::test_payment_s: PASSED - Verified payment settles oldest orders first

frontend_ui_verified.admin_place_order_page_title: VERIFIED - 'Place Order / Record Payment' title shown

rca_of_the_issue.bug: Admin Place Order page shows no customers or products
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: admin-place-order.tsx was calling apiService.getAdminUsers() which does not exist in api.ts. The correct method is apiService.getAllUsers()
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed line 60 from apiService.getAdminUsers() to apiService.getAllUsers()
rca_of_the_issue.verification_status: Fix applied but expo running in CI mode prevented hot reload verification
